channel.title: GitHub Roff Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Roff in GitHub

item.title: Ritik2703/Coursera---Programming-for-Everybody-Getting-Started-with-Python-
item.description: this contains all the answers to the quizes and asssignments for "Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python)" on Coursera by the University of Michigan.

item.title: lydrainbowcat/tedukuri
item.description: 《算法竞赛进阶指南》资源社区

item.title: zendesk/sunshine-conversations-rabbitmq-docker
item.description: RabbitMQ 3.5.7 with the required plugins, all set up

item.title: Ysurac/openmptcprouter
item.description: OpenMPTCProuter is an open source solution to aggregate multiple internet connections using Multipath TCP (MPTCP) on OpenWrt
